name: Salmon and Potato Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can (16 oz) salmon, drained and flaked
1 can (10.75 oz) cream of mushroom soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the sliced potatoes in a greased Crock-Pot.
2. Sprinkle with half of the flour, salt, and pepper.
3. Cover with half of the salmon flakes; sprinkle with half of the chopped onion.
4. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients in the same order.
5. Combine the soup and water in a bowl.
6. Pour over the potato-salmon mixture.
7. Dust with nutmeg.
8. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 10 hours.
9. Serves 6.
